title: Gate
sourceNotes: Cumulative episode numbering spans both TV cours: S1 'Gate' eps 1-12 (2015) + S2 'Gate Part 2' eps 13-24 (2016), both A-1 Pictures; the anime id is S1's. Ranges map onto Satoru Sao's manga adaptation (AniList: FINISHED, 143 chapters across 28 volumes; the main run ends with a ch 143 finale plus a 143.2 epilogue). The manga reorders and expands the light-novel material relative to the anime, so episode-to-chapter ranges are approximate. The 24-episode anime covers roughly ch 1-66 (through the Rondel / Oprichnina confrontation); ch 67-143 (the full-scale Japan-Empire civil war, Zorzal's downfall, and conclusion) are unadapted.

mappings.arc: Ginza Incident & the Special Region (Battle of Alnus, first Flame Dragon)
Japan Beyond the Gate (Diet hearing & the Ginza counterattack)
Coda Village & Imperial Capital diplomacy (Yao, Zorzal, the earthquake)
Tuka's grief & the Flame Dragon decisive battle (Dark Elves)
Magic City of Rondel & the Imperial coup / Oprichnina (anime finale)
Japan-Empire civil war, Zorzal's downfall & conclusion (unadapted)
